heroStats.label: NEA ARP allocation
heroStats.context: American Rescue Plan funding allocated to the National Endowment for the Arts for arts-sector recovery.

heroStats.label: State/local recovery fund
heroStats.context: Coronavirus State and Local Fiscal Recovery Funds made available to state, local, territorial, and Tribal governments.

heroStats.label: Direct NEA org grants
heroStats.context: Arts organizations recommended for direct NEA American Rescue Plan grants totaling $57.75M.

heroStats.label: SLFRF spend deadline
heroStats.context: Municipalities had until December 2026 to spend obligated SLFRF dollars.

charts.title: NEA American Rescue Plan arts funding moved through three channels
charts.description: The $135M NEA allocation included state/regional regranting, local arts agency subgranting, and direct grants to arts organizations.

charts.title: Selected local and state ARPA arts interventions varied widely in scale
charts.description: Examples show how flexible recovery dollars were adapted to different local arts ecosystems.

charts.title: Post-relief state arts appropriations entered FY2026 below FY2025
charts.description: Arts Midwest's summary of NASAA FY2026 data reports national state arts agency appropriations falling from $694.3M to $646.0M.
